slides.body: A new report suggests treating AI agents as junior engineers. This approach ensures safer and more effective use, mitigating risks from inconsistent results and probabilistic models in critical applications like cybersecurity.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalistic layout. Black background, white text. Left-aligned. A subtle blue (#2740eb) corner element. Right-pointing arrow.
slides.source_topic_headline: Treating AI Agents as Junior Engineers: Oversight for Productivity and Safety

slides.hook: AI's Deeper Impact on Higher Ed
slides.body: Beyond cheating, AI challenges universities to redefine their core purpose. As knowledge work automates, institutions must decide what higher education owes students and society.
slides.visual_direction: Minimalistic layout. White background, black text. Justified alignment. A subtle orange (#fe6203) corner element. Right-pointing arrow.
slides.source_topic_headline: AI in higher education poses a deeper threat than cheating, researchers argue
